user.title: Virtual Climate Device
user.description: Create a virtual climate entity that uses a room sensor to control a downstream mini split. All other settings use smart defaults and can be tuned later via Configure.

data.name: Virtual Climate Device Name
data.area_id: Area (optional — assigns the device to a room)

error.targets_invalid: Heat target must be lower than cool target

abort.already_configured: This sensor + climate pair is already configured

data.area_id: Area (optional — assigns the device to a room)

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Timing, fan tiers, and emergency fallback. Most users won't need to change these — the adaptive control system handles tuning automatically.

data.setpoint_offset: Setpoint offset pushed to mini split (°F)
data.start_measurement_delay: Sensor settle delay after cycle start (seconds)
data.room_sensor_stale_minutes: Treat room sensor as lost if no update for this many minutes (0 to disable)
data.room_sensor_stuck_hours: Treat room sensor as offline if the value hasn't changed at all for this many hours (0 to disable)
data.fan_tier_1_error: Fan tier 1: max error from target band (°F)
data.fan_tier_2_error: Fan tier 2: max error from target band (°F)
data.fan_tier_3_error: Fan tier 3: max error from target band (°F)
data.fan_tier_4_error: Fan tier 4: max error (use a large number for 'everything else')
data.emergency_enable: Enable emergency fallback when the room sensor is unavailable
data.outdoor_temp_sensor: Outdoor temperature sensor (optional, for emergency fallback)
data.emergency_heat_below_outdoor: Emergency: force heat when outdoor is below (°F)
data.emergency_cool_above_outdoor: Emergency: force cool when outdoor is above (°F)
data.emergency_heat_setpoint: Emergency heat setpoint sent to mini split (°F)
data.emergency_cool_setpoint: Emergency cool setpoint sent to mini split (°F)

error.targets_invalid: Heat target must be lower than cool target
